balls.commentary: Length on off, flicked off the back foot through midwicket. Just a bit of turn away
Full ball on leg nicely looped, driven to long-off
Length on off, flicked to square leg. Played off the back foot
Goes back to another ball on the fuller side of length. Works it off the back foot to mid-on
Length on off, punched towards mid-off
Almost under the bat. Length ball slanting in towards off, Markram goes back again and toes it to cover
short of a length, and angled into middle and off. Marsh gets an inside edge as he pushes forward, and the ball trickles behind

balls.description: Nitish Kumar to Markram, no run
balls.commentary: extra bounce for Nitish. Markram ends up fending at this aerially, as Nitish again goes on the shorter side on off

balls.description: Nitish Kumar to Markram, FOUR runs
balls.commentary: whipped just over the man at midwicket!!

balls.description: Nitish Kumar to Markram, FOUR runs
balls.commentary: swatted between extra cover and cover point. Nitish goes back to the short-of-a-length area, and this time the line is wide of off as well. Markram thrashes at it for four more
on the shorter side around off. Punched down to mid-off for a quick single

balls.description: Nitish Kumar to Marsh, FOUR runs
balls.commentary: one bounce, and four over mid-off. Marsh plays a lovely loft off this full ball swinging into off, and plays with a high left elbow. That looked so stylish
shortish in length, and angling into off. Punched to long-off
on a length, and slanting in to arrive on leg or just outside leg. Nudged to mid-on by opening his stance up
thumped down the ground. Slower from Dubey, but Markram is aware. Full and dipping on off, and he clears his front leg to heave at that
much fuller and quicker, and on off. Punched to long-off
full again, but this time it's much straighter. Driven back to Dubey
short in length, and on the stumps. Punched to wide long-off
there's a man out at deep point, and he moves to his right to cut this off. Short in length from Unadkat, and on middle. Marsh slashes this from outside off, as the ball seams away
short of a length on middle, and punched to mid-on
wow. Shot of the day, I think!! A pick-up pull, if there was ever one. Short in length, and arriving around off, as Markram pulls that late to go wide of mid-on for a delightful hit
angled in, and short of a length on middle and off. This almost cramps Markram for room, as he pushes it back
this time there's a fielder at deep midwicket. Another short delivery, but wide of off. Markram pulls it to the man out
lack of pace from Unadkat, who goes short and wide of off again. Marsh picks this up from outside off for a pull to deep midwicket
starts with a slower ball, and beats Marsh. It is a fullish ball in offspinner style, as it dips and moves in as Marsh looks to loft and misses
hard length now. This is fired on off, and Marsh pulls to midwicket off the higher side of the bat
another slower ball, but this time Marsh isn't fooled. Short of a length, and just outside off. Marsh lets the ball come into him, and punches just wide of mid-off

gone!! Taken at deep square leg. This ball is banged in short, and on off. There's slight seam movement back in, and also considerable bounce. Marsh goes for the pull, but gets it off the higher side of the bat. The ball flies to Nitish at the boundary
balls.dismissal: Mitchell Marsh c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Malinga 14 (12b 2x4 0x6 18m) SR: 116.66

balls.commentary: gets a ball on the shorter side of a length on off, and punches to cover point
lack of pace to Pant as well. This ball is on a length on off, and shapes away. Pant pushes to deep third
shorter side of a length, and angling into off. Flicked to square leg from middle stumps

ufff, just falls between mid-off and extra cover!! Markram punched at it aerially, as the ball was short and shaped away to finish outside off. For a second, it seemed like he was gone, but the ball went in the gap for four
another lovely punch, but this goes straight to the man at extra cover, who's at the edge of the circle. Shortish in length again from Unadkat, but this one is around off

wow, more luck goes Markram's way. He's not entirely in control of this drive, as the ball dips on to him to arrive as a low full toss. Unadkat thinks there's a caught-and-bowled chance, but the ball zooms past him even as Markram's bottom hand came off the bat
change of pace and length. Short and slow, as it pitches around seventh stump. Markram looks to pull as the ball gets big on him, but misses
what a sound off the bat!! Markram pumps Unadkat over fine leg. Another short ball which angles into him, and he rides the bounce to clobber it over the man at the boundary
bowls from wide of the crease, and goes full around off. Driven to mid-off
a freakish shot typical Pant style. Short delivery wide of leg from Harshal, and Pant goes for the pull. Pant gets the bottom edge all the way to deep third!!
short of a length, and shaping into middle and off. Punched to long-on
slower ball. But this arrives as a dipping full toss on middle and off. Pant whips it to wide long-on
on the shorter side of a length on off, and pushed aerially to long-on
short of a length, and finishing outside off after pitching on middle. Slapped to point
full and on middle and off. Driven down to long-off
good job by Aniket, as he runs and tumbles to his left from deep cover point. Pant cut at this short-of-a-length ball turning away from to finish around sixth stump, and got two
on the shorter side again, and wide-ish of off. Slapped to deep cover point
fired down the ground. Full ball on middle and off, and he clears his front leg to drill that back for four
full and slower on middle. Driven off the outside half of the bat to point for a hurried single

dropped by Kishan?! We'll see. Nope, it's given as byes. Short of a length from Shivang, who bowled outside off, and got this to turn into Pant. The latter went for the cut but missed, but I seemed to have heard a sound as the ball went through Kishan's gloves as well. Pant and Markram pinched a bye
barely clears mid-off!!
nearly gone again!!
slower ball, and beaten. Short delivery on middle and leg, and it slants away to go past Pant's bat, as he went for the pull
a yorker-length ball on leg, and hits Pant on his pad. Malinga and Kishan appeal for lbw, but it's turned down. Pant was looking to clip it away
a knee-height full toss on off, and punched to deep extra cover. Pant and Markram do well to pinch two
Abhishek at extra cover dives to his left and gets his hand, but the ball dribbles away to mid-off. Pant had slashed at this fullish delivery outside off by reaching out
on the bounce to the man at deep midwicket. Short ball from Shivang on off, as the ball straightens. Pant pulls with a swivel

taken on the long-off boundary. The ball went really high, but still gave the impression that it was on its way for six. The wrong 'un from Shivang, as he angles it across, and goes full on off. The ball turns away, and Markram mistimes his attempted loft through the line. Livingstone didn't have to
balls.dismissal: Aiden Markram c Livingstone b Shivang Kumar 45 (27b 6x4 2x6 44m) SR: 166.66

balls.commentary: ohh, nicely turned into him. Shivang bowls this on a length on off, and Badoni punches from middle towards cover point
Pant shapes to skip down, and Shivang fires a yorker-length ball on middle. Driven to long-on
full and outside leg, and swept to fine leg. Shivang has done well in this over so far
floated full, and around sixth stump. Driven to long-on off the inside half of the bat
bowls a short ball at a lack of pace. The ball arrives at Pant outside off despite pitching outside leg, and he pulls to short fine leg
great effort, but that's still four. The man at deep cover point ran and dived to his left to try and stop the ball. Badoni had punched that length delivery outside off, and beaten point to his right
slower ball, and full on off. Chipped to wide long-on
on the bounce to the point fielder. Shortish in length on middle, and Pant is nearly cramped in slashing at that
another short ball, but this is pulled from off by taking his eyes off. Single to fine leg
slower ball from wide of the crease. Badoni pushes at it away from his body for a single to point's right
Nicely played. Leans across and drives the full ball against the spin through cover.
Length on the pads, flicked to deep midwicket
Quick single to short fine leg, throw low and wide of the keeper. Direct hit may have been tight. Length on leg, flicked softly.
Length outside off, swept to deep midwicket
Overpitched and Pant breaks free. He gets forward, waits for it to get in line with his back leg and drives over mid-off
Full and short. Pant's ready. Twirls, uses the spin in to pull it just behind square. That'll reassure the LSG fans

Dubey outfoxes Badoni. The batter danced down but got yorked, the 99ks ball was well outside off, so Badoni had to reach out to punch it away. Got beaten, Kishan whips off the bails without his hands going back, Dhoni style
balls.dismissal: Ayush Badoni st †Ishan Kishan b Dubey 12 (9b 1x4 0x6 12m) SR: 133.33

balls.commentary: Wide on a length, let go
Goes for it second ball. It was the fullness in length that pushed him into it, driven off the bottom part of the bat to long-on
Low full toss on leg is flicked through square leg
Yorker fired on leg at 105ks, beats the flick and goes off the pad behind square
Wide on a length, Pooran gets his back foot across and cuts to backward point

Pooran finds a new way to lose his wicket... It's a touch unfortunate. He swept it into the pitch, Kishan moved right and caught it on the bounce, Pooran didn't know that and took a couple of steps. When he turned, the bails were off. The ball spun away a touch which might be why the ball went that
balls.dismissal: Nicholas Pooran run out (†Ishan Kishan) 1 (4b 0x4 0x6 3m) SR: 25

balls.commentary: Pulled to the right of long-on, very short, well outside off
Nearly a caught and bowled
Fullish just outside off, driven to long-off
Shortish ball spinning in towards off is pulled to deep midwicket
Length just outside off, punched to long-off
Length outside off, driven on the rise. Long-off runs left and dives to stop

balls.description: Malinga to Abdul Samad, no run
balls.commentary: Goes for the yorker, it's overpitched, punched to cover. Might've reversed
Runs stopped at point, crowd are happy. They have take one though. DIve to the right. Shortish ball outside off, jumps and cuts from the crease
Pant looks for the boundary, doesn't time it. Back of length outside off, back leg moves across and he slaps it to deep cover
Length outside off, square driven to deep point
Overthrows? No, bowler backs up the throw from point. Was guided there by Pant off the back foot. Timeout
That breaks some pressure. Unadkat misses his line by a touch, Pant gets on one kne and twirls across while helping the back-of-length ball fine
Dances down and gets bumped. Slower one outside off, pulled into the ground. Goes to long-on
Another leg-side boundary, to the right of deep fine leg this time. And it's off a low full toss. Pant flicking it from middle stump. Four fielders deep on the leg side, Pant still finding the gap
Stolen two. Turns it off the back foot to the edge of the ring at square leg. Kishan chases, turns and throws in one motion. It's off target
Short just under shoulder height, pulled to deep-backward square
Pitched up outside off, driven to deep cover

balls.description: Malinga to Abdul Samad, FOUR runs
balls.commentary: Close yorker, pumped down the ground. Almost takes out Rishabh and beats long-on to the right. The very full ball on off tailed in but Samad smothered it

balls.description: Malinga to Abdul Samad, no run
balls.commentary: Slower one outside off, cut to point

balls.description: Malinga to Abdul Samad, FOUR runs
balls.commentary: Into the pitch not working now, short and wide ball sits up. Samad jumps and helicopters a cut. Watch out for the whiplash. Over backward point
Now the yorker flies, long-off does well to cut it off. Stopped in front of the sighscreen. Ball was at the stumps and Samad drove it flat over the bowler
Slower bouncer beats him. Angling away just outside off, Pant went for a swat-cut
Slower length ball outside off is carved to deep-backward point. That's Malinga done for the day
Crowd catch back to the bowler. Pant danced down and drove the full ball back
Lot of bottom hand in that slap to cover. Full follow through, onto the back shoulder. Ball was a touch short outside off
Walks towards the bowler, gets a back of length ball darted at the stumps. Whipped to deep square leg

Taken at long-off, SRH hanging on even if barely. Samad got the ball he wanted, full and just outside off. Went for the step-hit, rotational arc with the bat face looking at the sky. Scraped it flat to the fielder
balls.dismissal: Abdul Samad c Livingstone b Dubey 16 (12b 2x4 0x6 23m) SR: 133.33

balls.commentary: Pitched up, driven down the ground
Livingstone charges but can't stop it. Very low full toss, drilled back past the bowler. All along the ground. Pant brings up fifty, no celebration
Low full toss outside off, flicked aerially to long-on
Short and wide, sits up proper. Cut hard to deep cover, where Nitish fumbles and allows the second
Low full toss outside off, looks to go over cover, gets it to the sweeper along the ground

Appeal for caught behind. Bowler not keen. No review taken. Was a shortish pace-on ball outside off. Mukul went across, got inside the line and looked to scoop it while standing mostly upright. Misses
Another dot, cue ended back to the bowler. Was a shin-high full toss on off. Mukul pre-meditated again, got across and went for the sweep.

Given lbw, LSG review. Will be a dot either way. Was a highish full toss that hit the outer-half of the back thigh. Mukul swung across the line and missed... and got hit outside the line of the stumps, Hawk-Eye shows

It is yorker first ball... but is drilled to the straight boundary! Long-on chased to the right, no long-off. Beats the dive. Very good ball, at the stumps but Pant somehow got underneath and drove it through

Shot of the match and that's the game sealed! Pant's upper-body leant to the leg side, contorted himself again and flat-batted a shortish ball, from shoulder-height mind you, and flat-batted it over mid-off tennis style
Wide yorker is chomped to cover, fielder's well in
Driven... straight to mid-off. Mukul takes off and is sent back early. Low full toss, Pant hitting it along the ground
Third time's the charm and Pant wins it for LSG! Gentle tap of the glove to the partner. Wide, full ball, Pant gets on one knee and with a mostly horizontal bat, slaps it over mid-off
